name: Florentine Cheese Tarts
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute ham, butter, onion, spinach, spices, and 2 tablespoons of flour together; set aside.
2. Whisk eggs, sugar, 1/2 cup flour, and cheeses in a bowl.
3. Add the sauteed ham mixture to the whisked ingredients.
4. Pour into greased muffin cups.
5. Bake for 30 minutes at 325°F.
6. Cool completely.
7. Slide a knife around each tart to loosen; remove from pans.
8. Reheat on a baking sheet at 325°F for about 15 minutes.
Makes about 30 tarts.
